columns.extraction_plan: From the "abstract" section on page 1 (Chunk 8), extract: "darolutamide or placebo plus androgen-deprivation therapy and docetaxel". From the "METHODS" section on page 2 (Chunk 8), extract: "oral darolutamide 600 mg twice daily or matched placebo, in combination with ADT and docetaxel". From Figure 1 (Chunk 0) on page 3, the treatment arms are labeled: "Darolutamide + docetaxel + ADT" and "Placebo + docetaxel + ADT". From Table 1 (Chunk 1) on page 5, the table title refers to "Darolutamide Plus Androgen-Deprivation Therapy and Docetaxel". From Figure 2 (Chunk 2) on page 6 and Figure 3 (Chunk 3) on page 7, the curve labels specify: "Darolutamide + ADT + docetaxel" and "Placebo + ADT + docetaxel".
